account.onboarding.company.title: Company
account.onboarding.company.subdomainRules: Lowercase letters (a-z), numbers (0-9), and hyphens (-), Max 10 Character are allowed
account.onboarding.company.includeAdminLabel: Also give me access to the employee portal using my admin email
account.onboarding.company.adminEmailNotLoaded: We couldn't load your admin email yet. Refresh the page, or sign out and sign in again.
account.onboarding.company.removeAdminRowAria: Uncheck the option above to remove your admin row
account.onboarding.company.employeePortalIntro: Add people who should sign in to your company's employee portal.

account.onboarding.dashboard.title: Welcome to Prego!
account.onboarding.dashboard.intro: Complete the following steps to set up your account and launch your server.

account.onboarding.launch.title: Almost there
account.onboarding.launch.minimalIntro: Your workspace is being prepared. You can close this tab — we will email you when everything is ready.
account.onboarding.launch.reconnecting: Trying to reconnect to the control plane…
account.onboarding.launch.workspaceReadyTitle: Your workspace will be ready shortly.
account.onboarding.launch.workspaceReadyBody: Please feel free to activate your tenant on your subdomain at your earliest convenience. Once the setup is confirmed, we will send all necessary access details—including your workspace links, API gateway, and portal URLs—directly to your registered email address, so please be sure to check your inbox.
account.onboarding.launch.waitingSelfTestIntro: Your workspace is provisioned; we are running API self-tests and final gateway checks. You can close this tab — we will email you when everything is ready.
account.onboarding.launch.waitingVerifyIntro: Provisioning finished; we are verifying DNS, secure tunnel connectivity, gateways, and final handoff. This usually completes within a minute.
account.onboarding.launch.gracePeriodIntro: Your server was created. We are verifying installation status — this may take up to a minute.
account.onboarding.launch.awaitingServerIntro: Your server is booting and connecting to our platform. This usually takes a few minutes — please keep this tab open.
account.onboarding.launch.reconnectBannerIntro: Connection to the control plane is unstable. This page will keep retrying. If it lasts several minutes, contact
account.onboarding.launch.reconnectBannerReferenceFallback: with your support reference (shown when available).
account.onboarding.launch.earlyPipelineHintIntro: This label is the first install stage until the server pipeline reports step events to the control plane. If it stays here for several minutes, the workflow may be queued or blocked—use your support reference or contact
account.onboarding.launch.pipelineNeverTriggered: Provisioning was accepted, but the platform did not start the install pipeline. The progress bar may stay near the first step. Contact {supportEmail}{traceSuffix}

account.onboarding.payment_success.title: Payment Successful!
account.onboarding.payment_success.linkingWorkspace: Linking your paid workspace to this browser session…
account.onboarding.payment_success.workspaceBlocked: We could not register your workspace from this payment session. Refresh this page while signed in, or contact support with your transaction id.
account.onboarding.payment_success.confirmationEmail: A confirmation and invoice will be sent to {email} from Vouus. You may also receive a receipt from Stripe.
account.onboarding.payment_success.emailMissingHint: Enter your email on Stripe Checkout to receive Vouus billing email, or use Download receipt when available. Stripe may also send its own receipt.
account.onboarding.payment_success.receiptEmailHint: Receipt link will appear in your confirmation email if not shown here.
account.onboarding.payment_success.needHelp: Need help? Contact our support team at

account.onboarding.platform.optionNotAvailableNotice: This option is not available yet. Please select the Recommended option, or contact support for early access.

account.onboarding.provision_email.accountEmailHint: Account email (Work App / invites): {email}. If login fails after desk email only, use Resend provisioning emails below to send employee portal invites.

account.shell.backup.pageDescription: View automated backup status, retention policy, and recovery points for your organization.
account.shell.backup.noOrganizations: No organizations linked to your account.
account.shell.backup.loadError: Could not load backup status. Please try again.
account.shell.backup.maintenanceError: Backup status is temporarily unavailable. Our team has been notified — please try again later or contact Support.
account.shell.backup.forbiddenError: You do not have access to backup status for this organization.
account.shell.backup.rpoStatusHint_ok: Your latest backup meets the RPO target for your plan.
account.shell.backup.rpoStatusHint_catch_up: A backup is overdue but Autopilot is scheduling a catch-up run.
account.shell.backup.rpoStatusHint_breach: Backups are significantly overdue. Contact Support if this persists.
account.shell.backup.byoBannerBody: Your organization uses Enterprise BYO hosting. Database and infrastructure backups are your responsibility. Vouus platform backups do not apply to your ERP VM.
account.shell.backup.policyByoNote: Reference policy for Vouus Managed hosting. Your BYO environment is not covered by platform backups.
account.shell.backup.layerALabelDetail: Database and weekly site files — all plans
account.shell.backup.layerBEnabled: Included on your plan (monthly, up to 2 retained)
account.shell.backup.layerBDisabled: Available on Business and Enterprise plans
account.shell.backup.upsellLayerBTitle: Need faster recovery and VM snapshots?
account.shell.backup.upsellLayerBBody: Business and Enterprise plans include Layer B VM snapshots and shorter recovery time objectives (RTO).
account.shell.backup.recoveryPointsEmpty: No verified recovery points yet. Autopilot will create the first backup soon.
account.shell.backup.howItWorksLayers_0_body: Frappe bench backup exports your database (and weekly site files) to encrypted cloud storage. Runs automatically on an Autopilot schedule.
account.shell.backup.howItWorksLayers_1_body: Business and Enterprise plans also receive full VM snapshots for faster recovery when the server itself fails.
account.shell.backup.howItWorksLayers_2_body: Platform golden images help rebuild VMs. They do not replace your ERP data — Layer A and B protect your tenant data.
account.shell.backup.recoveryGuideIntro: Restore operations are performed by Vouus Support to protect your data. When you need recovery, contact Support with your organization and the recovery point timestamp from the table above.
account.shell.backup.recoveryScenarios_0_body: Support can restore from a Layer A recovery point to the current or a new VM.
account.shell.backup.recoveryScenarios_1_body: Support uses Restore to New VM — Layer B snapshot when available, otherwise Layer A plus a fresh VM.
account.shell.backup.recoveryScenarios_2_body: Support can restore an older verified recovery point to a clean VM. Report the incident promptly.
account.shell.backup.securityBullets_0: Backup artifacts are stored in tenant-isolated cloud storage — not downloadable from this portal.
account.shell.backup.securityBullets_1: Manifest checksums verify backup integrity; optional HMAC signing on platform side.
account.shell.backup.securityBullets_2: Expired backups are purged automatically per your plan retention period.
account.shell.backup.securityBullets_3: Restore requests are audited; subdomain confirmation prevents mistaken restores.
account.shell.backup.securityBullets_4: The platform periodically verifies restore readiness (DiRT sampling).
account.shell.backup.contactSupportHint: Include your organization name and desired recovery point when requesting restore.

attendance.whatBody: Check in when you start work and check out when you finish. Your attendance history appears here automatically.
attendance.howStep1: Tap Check In when you arrive at work (office or home).
attendance.howStep2: Tap Check Out when your shift ends.
attendance.howStep3: Review daily hours and totals in this list.
attendance.startBody: Use the check-in button at the top of the home screen.

expenses.whatBody: Capture receipts and submit expenses for reimbursement. Approved claims are tracked here.
expenses.howStep1: Tap + and photograph or upload your receipt.
expenses.howStep2: Choose a category and enter the amount.
expenses.howStep3: Submit for approval — status updates appear in this list.
expenses.startBody: Keep a photo of your receipt handy.

checklist.whatBody: Keep work, home, and personal tasks in one checklist with due dates and progress.
checklist.howStep1: Tap + to create a task with a name and due date.
checklist.howStep2: Mark tasks done as you complete them.
checklist.howStep3: Track overall progress on the overview bar.
checklist.startBody: Start with one small task due today.

invoices.whatBody: Build professional invoices, preview them, and track payment status.
invoices.howStep1: Tap + and enter client details and line items.
invoices.howStep3: Send to your client and monitor open vs paid here.
invoices.startBody: You can save a draft and finish later.

customers.whatBody: Browse ERP customers synced from your company workspace.
customers.howStep1: Use Open in CRM for Frappe CRM on your tenant host.
customers.howStep2: Use Work Desk for full ERP customer records and accounting links.

leaves.whatBody: Apply for annual, sick, and other leave types. Your balance and history stay in one place.
leaves.howStep1: Check your remaining leave balance at the top.
leaves.howStep2: Select dates on the calendar and choose a leave type.
leaves.howStep3: Submit your request — approved leave appears in history.
leaves.startBody: Tap Leave application or the + button to pick dates and leave type.

notices.whatBody: Updates about leave, expenses, invoices, and tasks from your company ERP appear here.
notices.howStep1: Tap the bell icon on a notice to mark it as read.
notices.howStep2: Use View details to open the related module when a link is available.

app.myAi.title: Prego AI
app.myAi.navAssistantDescription: Chat with AI for policies, HR, and daily work — open a fresh conversation.

app.myAi.description: Get instant answers to company policies, procedures, and any work-related inquiries. I analyze your uploaded documents to provide accurate, context-aware information in seconds.

Final Review & Legal Submission Affirmation

The information you have entered will be registered as an official personnel record. Please review the details carefully and provide your consent before clicking the submit button.

app.onboarding.consentText: By submitting, you agree that the company may collect and use the information you provided for onboarding, payroll, HR and legal compliance purposes, in accordance with its privacy policy and applicable law (e.g. PDPA). You may request access to or correction of your data.

www.home.meta_description: Unify HR, finance, and operations on one workflow platform. Approvals, automation, and books that stay in sync—built for growing teams in APAC.
www.home.hero_title: Run your business in one flow
www.home.hero_description: One platform for people, money, and approvals—without spreadsheets or swivel-chair work.
www.home.pillars_0_description: HR, finance, and ops on one record.
www.home.pillars_1_description: Approvals and tasks without the chase.
www.home.pillars_2_description: Audit trails and regional compliance built in.
www.home.problem_subtitle: When work stalls, teams pay the cost.
www.home.problem_0_tagline: Hand-offs stall when status lives in DMs.
www.home.problem_1_tagline: Finance chases receipts across tools and files.
www.home.problem_2_tagline: Leaders act on stale data with no audit trail.
www.home.features_subtitle: One spine for how work runs.
www.home.modules_0_tagline: Check-in to payroll on one approval path.
www.home.modules_1_tagline: Capture and approve without the chase.
www.home.modules_3_tagline: Publish approvals your team can maintain.
www.home.stats_context: Teams report less manual work and faster month-end after switching.
www.home.testimonial_title: Build automation on a real workflow spine
www.home.testimonial_quote: Month-end used to take us three days of chasing data. Now it is a one-day review—the workflow spine handles what used to be manual hand-offs.
www.home.testimonial_author_line: Sarah Lim, CFO at NovaTech Solutions
www.home.testimonial_footnote: Join teams across Singapore and Southeast Asia.
www.home.pricing_subline: Start small. Add automation as you grow.
www.home.support_subtitle: Talk to our team, see a live demo, or start your free trial today.
www.home.support_0_description: See the platform in action with a personalised walkthrough.
www.home.support_1_description: 14-day Pro trial, work email required, no credit card.
www.home.support_2_description: Discuss pricing, migration, or enterprise requirements.
www.home.faq_0_q: What is included in the platform subscription?
www.home.faq_0_a: You can move to a higher tier to add users, capacity, and support levels. We will help you right-size the plan as your usage and teams grow.
www.home.faq_1_q: Are there user or system limits?
www.home.faq_1_a: Each package has a user limit, but system usage (compute/storage) is scalable, and we offer pay-as-you-go options to support growth.
www.home.faq_2_q: Can we start small and expand later?
www.home.faq_2_a: Yes. Many teams begin with a smaller tier and move up as they onboard more users and workflows.
www.home.faq_3_q: Who is the Enterprise plan best suited for?
www.home.faq_3_a: It is designed for large organizations requiring dedicated instances, on-premise deployment, or those with strict security mandates that require isolated environments.
www.home.faq_4_q: What payment methods do you accept?
www.home.faq_4_a: We accept major credit cards, bank transfer, and invoice billing for annual plans. Contact us for enterprise payment options.
www.home.faq_5_a: Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing period. Prorated credits may apply.

www.home.faq_7_q: What happens if we exceed our user limit?
www.home.faq_7_a: You can upgrade to a higher tier or add users via pay-as-you-go options. We will notify you before any overage charges apply.
www.home.faq_8_a: Yes. Annual billing includes a 10% discount compared to monthly billing.
www.home.faq_9_q: What do you mean by workflow automation?
www.home.faq_9_a: It is the ability to run recurring business steps—notifications, routing, payroll windows, invoice dispatch—on rules you define, with full history instead of one-off manual clicks.
